response.objective_caption: A man wearing a light gray button-down shirt holds a bright yellow bowl containing a partially eaten dessert topped with whipped cream in his left hand and brings a white plastic spoon toward his open mouth. He wears a silver watch on his right wrist. The scene takes place outdoors at night, with dark foliage and partial views of other people visible in the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A man wearing a light gray button-down shirt holds a bright yellow bowl containing a partially eaten dessert topped with whipped cream in his left hand and brings a white plastic spoon toward his open mouth. Aggressively harsh direct flash lighting creates bright specular highlights across his forehead and cheeks while casting hard shadows against the nearly black nighttime background, producing an unflattering snapshot aesthetic.
